sources.name: Devex
sources.description: Global development funding news, RFPs, and grant opportunities. One of the most comprehensive sources for international development funding.

sources.name: FCDO DevTracker
sources.description: UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office funding tracker. Shows all active FCDO-funded projects, new grants, and procurement opportunities.

sources.name: Global Partnership for Education — News
sources.description: GPE news, new grants, and funding calls. Tanzania received $88M in 2026 — monitor for complementary NGO opportunities.

sources.name: ReliefWeb Funding
sources.description: OCHA's humanitarian and development funding database. RFPs, EOIs, and grant calls from UN agencies, bilateral donors, and foundations.

sources.name: Philanthropy News Digest
sources.description: Candid's grant opportunity digest. Aggregates RFPs from foundations across education, disability, and international development.

sources.name: Candid / Foundation Directory
sources.description: Comprehensive foundation database. Good for discovering new foundations aligned with education and disability. Searchable by geography and focus area.

sources.name: Tanzania PPRA Portal
sources.description: Tanzania Public Procurement Regulatory Authority. Government tenders, procurement notices, and co-financing opportunities. Critical for local government funding.

sources.name: Microsoft AI for Accessibility Blog
sources.description: Microsoft's AI for Accessibility programme news and grant updates. Rolling grant opportunities up to $150K. Primary Timamu source.

sources.name: Founders Pledge Research Blog
sources.description: Founders Pledge publishes research on cause areas and recommended funds. Monitor for new education/development recommendations that could position LearnImpact favourably.

sources.name: Africa Education Research Digest
sources.description: Curated digest of education research and funding news across Africa. Good for staying current on funder priorities and new programme announcements.
